name: FormKit drag-and-drop
when_to_use: 需要把一个或多个列表做成 data-first 拖拽排序/跨列转移时用它而非手写 Pointer Events,因为原生在落点判定、触屏拖动、动画和数组顺序同步上失败。非做只有上移/下移按钮的简单排序。
why_valuable: AI 默认能画静态列表,但默认做不到流畅拖拽、触屏与鼠标统一命中、多列表转移及 DOM 顺序和源数组始终一致;该库把最终顺序直接保留为数组。

data_in.note: data.items 是状态源;boot 为每个值创建一个同序 DOM 子项,再把 getValues/setValues 交给上游原生 dragAndDrop。条目不另造拖拽事件协议。

items.label: string —— 子项显示文本
items.disabled?: boolean —— 是否作为不可拖子项由消费 AI 另配规则,默认 false

spec.note: 拖拽落点计算需要稳定滚动区域;列表默认 height 320px 且内部滚动,AI 可改成其他明确像素值,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why_no_minimal: sequence 是 AI 原生浅结构,getValues/setValues 的精确契约已由 schema 与 boot 钉死,不需要额外 minimal。

uplink._note: 本条只维护局部 values,不焊接统一回调;消费 AI 在需要回传时读取当前 values。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行把 values 的 JSON 编入 sendPrompt 文案。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行把 values 交给 sendFollowUpMessage。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;提供把 values 下载为 JSON 的兜底。

carriers.widget: supported:vanilla DOM + Pointer Events,挂载点可完全位于 shadowRoot,无外部 CSS/worker/wasm
carriers.codex: supported:单一 ESM CDN,无外部资产

isolation.evidence: Base dragAndDrop injects no CSS (no createElement('style')/insertRule; document.head is only *queried* by the opt-in animations plugin, unused by the boot). Global footprint is transient and drag-scoped: synthetic/touch drag builds a popover='manual' div of cloned rows (top layer) that is .remove()d on drop; window 'resize' + scroll-parent 'scroll' listeners are added on dragStart and torn down via an AbortController (Pe.abort() on dragEnded). At rest there is zero footprint, so mouse-drag sorting works cleanly inside shadow.

en.when_to_use: Use it to make one or more lists support data-first drag sorting and cross-list transfer instead of implementing Pointer Events by hand, which fails at drop-target detection, touch dragging, animation, and array-order synchronization. Not for simple ordering with only move-up/move-down buttons.
en.why_valuable: AI can draw a static list by default but cannot provide smooth dragging, unified mouse/touch hit testing, multi-list transfer, and permanent agreement between DOM order and source arrays; this library stores the final order directly as an array.

data_in.note: data.items is the state source; boot creates one same-order DOM child for each value, then passes getValues/setValues to the upstream native dragAndDrop. The entry does not invent a separate drag-event protocol.

items.label: string -- Child display text
items.disabled?: boolean -- Whether the consuming AI should configure this as a non-draggable child; default false

spec.note: Drop-target calculation needs a stable scrolling area; the list defaults to height 320px with internal scrolling. AI may use another explicit pixel value; vh and percentage heights are forbidden (rule 3).
